effects.effect: Add this card to your Hand.

effects.name: Run Away
effects.effect: After a Vivosaur is played in a Vivosaur Zone: You can add 1 Tool Action card from your Deck to your Hand and place this card you control into your FP Zone.

effects.name: Machine Maker
effects.effect: Add 1 Action card from your Deck to your hand that can play itself as a Vivosaur.

effects.name: Cryo Sleep
effects.effect: Apply Sleep to this Vivosaur, also this card heals LP until it's at MAX LP.
